error_signature: IF node not filtering items correctly
title: IF Node Filtering Inconsistencies
symptom: The IF node in n8n is not filtering items as expected, leading to inconsistent outputs where some 'active' items are filtered out or sent to the wrong branch.
applies_when: Filtering based on a status condition
not_this_if: All items have consistent formatting and data types
root_cause: The IF node evaluates each item individually, and inconsistencies in data formatting, such as extra spaces or case differences, can lead to unexpected filtering results. If the status values are not uniform, the condition may not evaluate as intended.
fix_steps: Modify the IF node condition to normalize the status value using: {{$json.status && $json.status.toLowerCase().trim() === 'active'}}
Check the execution preview to ensure all items have a status field.
agent_instruction: Update the IF node condition to normalize the status value for consistent filtering.
